---
id: patch-artifact-metadata-by-tag
title: "Patch Artifact Metadata by Tag"
description: "Patch artifact metadata for the referenced version. Only tags can be patched; provided fields are merged."
sidebar_label: "Patch Artifact Metadata by Tag"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "patch api-method"
info_path: docs/api/enclave-api-server
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Patch Artifact Metadata by Tag"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/v1/artifact/{namespace}/{name}/tag/{tag}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Patch artifact metadata for the referenced version. Only tags can be patched; provided fields are merged.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
